description.value:
Send Medication prescription ingangsdatum-criterium building blocks for patient C. XXX_Brugge
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 1 MA met onzekerheidscriterium Medicatievoorschrift met onzekerheidscriterium
Send Medication prescription ingangsdatum-criterium resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '10138') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '26603') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '10138') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '26603') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '10138|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (CHLOORHEXIDINE CREME 10MG/G)
